aids.title: The Update Rule
aids.content: theta = theta - lr * gradient. Minus because we go OPPOSITE to gradient (descending, not ascending).

aids.title: Ball Rolling Downhill
aids.content: Gradient descent is like a ball rolling down a hill. Learning rate is the ball's speed. Momentum is the ball's inertia - it keeps rolling even on flat patches.
aids.forRemembering: Intuition for gradient descent and momentum

aids.title: Epoch-Iteration Relationship
aids.content: iterations_per_epoch = dataset_size / batch_size. With 1000 samples and batch_size=100, you get 10 iterations per epoch.
